header.clearSessionDescription: This clears the chat, step-form notes, and report preview, and removes the saved draft on this device. Sessions already saved under History on the server are not deleted.
header.printPdfTipBody: In the system print dialog, choose “Save as PDF” (or “Microsoft Print to PDF”) as the printer.

formPlanner.general: After completing the steps above, switch to Smart Chat for details, then tap “Refresh report” to update the preview.
formPlanner.pediatrics: Please add age/weight-based doses when possible; use Smart Chat for temperature trends, then refresh the report.
formPlanner.chronic: Focus on recent labs and whether medications were taken as prescribed; refresh the report for a pre-visit summary.

export.empty: Nothing to export yet — add chat or step-form notes (and optionally refresh the report) first.

md.noReport: (No report preview — refresh the report on the right and export again)
md.name: Name
md.footer: Generated by MedBrief for organization only — not a diagnosis. Follow your clinician’s advice.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.emergency: This tool is for organizing consultation information only and does not provide medical diagnosis. In case of emergency, please call 120/911 immediately.
disclaimer.footer: Not a Diagnostic Certificate · For Doctor's Reference Only
disclaimer.description: This report is generated by MedBrief AI Assistant based on patient-provided information. All content must be verified by a professional doctor and cannot be used as a basis for diagnosis.

report.title: Consultation Report Preview
report.staleHint: The chat or step form changed — refresh the report to update the preview.
report.refreshTooltip: Rebuild the structured report from chat and step-form notes.
report.synthesizeBanner: Could not refresh the report (network or server error).
report.name: Name
report.editHintBadge: Tap pencil to edit on mobile

chat.welcome:
Hello! I'm a pre-visit information assistant. I only organize notes — I do not diagnose. Start with what's bothering you and how long it's been going on.

Tip: use “Step Form” for quick tags, then tap “Refresh report” on the right (or open it from the floating button on small screens).

welcomeByScenario.general:
Hello! I'm a pre-visit information assistant. I only organize notes — I do not diagnose. Start with what's bothering you and how long it's been going on.

Tip: use “Step Form” for quick tags, then tap “Refresh report” on the right (or open it from the floating button on small screens).
welcomeByScenario.pediatrics:
Hello! This is the pediatrics pre-visit template. Start with the child’s age, main complaint (fever, cough, diarrhea, etc.), and roughly when it began.

If you mention fever reducers or prescriptions, include dose and schedule when possible; use Step Form quick tags, then refresh the report.
welcomeByScenario.chronic:
Hello! This template focuses on chronic follow-up. Please summarize recent vitals/labs (BP, glucose, etc.), whether meds were taken regularly, any missed doses or self-adjustments, and new test results.

Use Step Form, then refresh the report for a pre-visit outline.

chat.placeholder: Describe your symptoms, and I'll help organize them into a consultation report...
chat.voiceUnsupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser. Try Chrome or Edge desktop, or type instead.
chat.voiceError: Speech recognition failed. Please try again or type your message.
chat.voiceMicBlockedHint: Allow microphone for this site in browser settings, or type instead.
chat.voiceLimitedBrowser: Speech input may be unreliable in this browser — try Chrome / Edge (desktop or Android) if issues persist.
chat.voiceWait: Please wait until the assistant finishes replying before using voice input.
chat.networkBanner: The last chat request did not finish — network or server issue.
chat.pdfTooLarge: This PDF is too large (try ≤12 MB). Split or compress before uploading.
chat.pdfManyPages: ~{{pages}} pages detected — uploads may be slow on mobile; consider uploading only relevant pages.
chat.pdfRetry: PDF upload failed: {{detail}} · Try again with a better connection.

form.pickedToastBody: {{label}} — {{suggestion}}. Tap “Refresh report” on the right to update the preview.
form.bioPickedBody: Tap “Refresh report” on the right to update the preview.

status.healthUnreachable: Cannot reach /api/health — start the server on 127.0.0.1:8000.
